name: International
description: Organization operates across multiple countries and has global-level authority or representation.

name: Continental
description: Organization operates within a continent or multi-country regional block (e.g. Europe, Asia, Americas).

name: National
description: Organization operates within a single country and is recognized at the state/national level.

name: Regional
description: Organization operates within a specific region that may include multiple administrative areas inside a country or across nearby territories.

name: Local
description: Organization operates within a city, municipality, or very limited geographic area.
